title: ParticleTrail
description: Do you often get lost in Minecraft's vast caves and struggle to find your way back? With ParticleTrail, you can leave a glowing trail of particles wherever you go, making it easy to trace your path back home.
body:
Never get lost in the vast caves of Minecraft again with ParticleTrail! This plugin provides a practical and visually stunning solution for navigation. As you explore, ParticleTrail generates a captivating trail of particles behind you, making it easy to follow your path back home. Ideal for adventurers and builders alike, this plugin ensures you never lose your way again.

Features:

Dynamic Particle Trails: Leave a vibrant trail of particles wherever you go, with customizable particle types and colors.
Easy Activation: Use the specified anchor block from your configuration file to mark the start of your trail. Simply equip the anchor block, crouch, and place it to activate.
Simple Trail Management: Clear the trail with a single command (/cleartrail) when you no longer need it, or if you want to create a new path.
How to Use:

Configuration: Set the anchor block type in the config.yml file of your plugin. This block will be used to start the particle trail.
Activate the Trail: Equip the anchor block in your hand and crouch while placing it at the location where you want your trail to begin.
Clearing the Trail: When you’re ready to remove the trail, simply use the /cleartrail command. This will stop the trail effect and clear the path markers.
With ParticleTrail, you can enhance your Minecraft experience by making exploration safer and more enjoyable. Whether you're navigating intricate cave systems or marking out your building sites, ParticleTrail has you covered!
